===Pokémon Adventures===
====={{MangaArc|Black & White}}=====
Drayden first appeared in ''[[PS475|The Mystery of the Missing Fossil]]'' as part of {{adv|Black}}'s imagination when he expressed his desire to defeat each of the Unova Gym Leaders.

He debuted in person in ''[[PS497|Finding Truth]]''. [[Brycen]] informed him of the other Gym Leaders failing to protect the [[Dark Stone]] from the [[Shadow Triad]], leading to them getting kidnapped. Fearing that [[Team Plasma]] may obtain {{DL|Tao trio (Adventures)|Zekrom}}'s power, Drayden decided the best option was to obtain {{DL|Tao trio (Adventures)|Reshiram}}'s power via the [[Light Stone]]. As he said this, the Light Stone rolled towards Black, choosing him as the next Hero of Truth. 

In ''[[PS498|Decisions, Decisions]]'', Drayden and Brycen met on the [[Tubeline Bridge]] while Black trained in order to wield the Light Stone. Brycen noted relying on Reshiram would make them no better than Team Plasma. Drayden replied that they had no other option strong enough to face a [[Legendary Pokémon]] like Zekrom. Later, Drayden properly introduced himself to Black, stating he expected great things from the boy. Afterward, Drayden left to do his own business and told [[Iris]] to stay with Black for the duration of his training in hopes that she would learn from it as well. 

In ''[[PS504|The Cold Hard Truth]]'', Drayden held a press conference in [[Opelucid City]], where he revealed to the public that the [[Pokémon Association]] agreed to change the {{un|Pokémon League}}'s opening date would be pushed up from three months to a week. Black was horrified to learn this news, as he believed it would be impossible to win his final Gym Badge in that amount of time.

In ''[[PS511|Dream a Little Dream]]'', Drayden hosted the Pokémon League's opening ceremonies. Later, Black challenged Drayden to a Gym battle, pointing out that he still had until the tournament officially began to earn his final Badge. Drayden accepted the challenge and faced Black in a small hallway. Eventually, he was defeated, earning Black the {{badge|Legend}} and a place in the League tournament.

In ''[[PS520|Cold Hard Truth]]'', Team Plasma launched their attack on the Pokémon League by summoning [[N's Castle]] from the depths of the earth. The castle surrounded the League building while several {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s came out and cornered everyone. Drayden and Iris worked together to protect innocent bystanders from the Grunts. After Team Plasma was defeated, Drayden and the others watched as {{adv|N}} and Zekrom flew off to parts unknown. 

====={{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}=====
Two years later, in ''[[PS526|Mr. Perfect]]'', Drayden congratulated {{adv|Cheren}} on becoming a teacher at the [[Aspertia City]]'s [[Pokémon academy|Trainers' School]]. He revealed that he made Iris the Opelucid Gym Leader in order to focus on finding Black, who had been sealed in the Light Stone. He also revealed the existence of {{p|Kyurem}} and warned Cheren that the newly-resurfaced Team Plasma may be after it.

In ''[[PS546|Giant Chasm]]'', Drayden helped free people trapped by ice created by Team Plasma's flying ship, the [[Plasma Frigate]]. He declined [[Kimi]]'s suggestion to go and face Team Plasma, declaring that as a mayor, his main focus is keeping the public safe from harm.

====Pokémon====
{{anchor|Druddigon 2}}{{TrainerPoké

|pkmn=Druddigon

|epnum=PS499
|epname=School of Hard Knocks
|desc={{p|Druddigon}} is Drayden's only known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Iris's Fraxure]], where it easily defeated its opponent. When Drayden was speaking to the press in front of his Gym, Druddigon roared at the crowd to get them to quiet down. During Drayden's Gym battle against Black, Druddigon went up against Black's {{p|Braviary}}, [[Brav]]. With its speed, Druddigon proved to be a powerful foe but was defeated when Brav opened a door to let in a blizzard, freezing Druddigon in place and leaving it wide open to an attack.

Druddigon's known moves are {{m|Dragon Tail}}, {{m|Dragon Rage}}, and {{m|Rock Climb}}, and its Ability is {{a|Sheer Force}}.}}

Drayden also has at least three other Pokémon in his arsenal as seen in the flashback in the battle against Iris.
